{{Quote|It's so hard for me to find a match now that I've been banned from the Upper City cantina.|Gelrood to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Gelrood''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] who lived on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. After winning fifteen games straight in the [[Upper City Cantina]], he was accused of cheating. They confiscated his "lucky" deck and banned him from the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], forcing him to play in [[Javyar's Cantina]] in the [[Lower City]]. He claimed innocence and exceptional skill, denying the allegations of cheating.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Gelrood appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]].

Another NPC in the game named [[Holdan]] has the exact same character model and outfit as Gelrood, despite them both appearing in Javyars's Cantina simultaneously.
